TrustBridge AIBorrower Portal
ConsentReadinessSummaryRoadmap
Step 1 of 4Consent • Readiness • Summary • Roadmap

Data Consent

Grant permission to access your financial data via RBI AA Framework

Data Sources

📋

GST Returns

Transaction-level GST filings for the past 12 months

Used for: Cash Flow & Compliance Analysis

🏦

Account Aggregator (Bank)

Bank statement via RBI AA framework

Used for: Repayment Capacity & EMI Analysis

📱

UPI Transactions

Digital payment history from UPI apps

Used for: Cash Flow Consistency Check

🧾

Invoices

B2B and B2C invoices issued and received

Used for: Revenue Verification & Trend Analysis

🏪

Business Profile

Business details, EPFO, and ownership info

Used for: Identity & Business Verification

🔒Data accessed via RBI Account Aggregator framework. Your data is encrypted and used only for the stated purpose.
